props.ChoiceText: You named the hour for an important undertaking, and when fortune held people began consulting your tables before trusting their own nerve.
props.ChoiceBio: A successful election of the hour taught others to treat your timing as a form of authority.

0.TransitionText: Because a successful election of the hour taught others to treat your timing as a form of authority, number, omen, and the heavens still held your attention.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Astrologer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a successful election of the hour taught others to treat your timing as a form of authority, counsel and prediction brought you closer to powerful households.

2.TransitionText: Because a successful election of the hour taught others to treat your timing as a form of authority, your star-lore bent your fate another way.
